22200.1.name: The Past, Present, and Eternal Show

30200.1.name: Savage God, Mad King, Incarnation of Strife

30201.name: The Giver, Master of Legions, Lance of Fury

31200.1.name: Flame Reaver of the Deepest Dark

32200.name: Pollux, Netherwing Husk, Ferry of Souls

33300.name: Sublime, Radiant, Avatar of the Sky

33301.name: Decimator, Karma of Daythunder, Eye of Twilight

23400.name: Annihilator of Desolation Mistral
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After Weakness is Broken, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by 100%.

Gepard will join the battle and provide protection for Boss Mirage. Boss Mirage will Transfer its own Weakness Type to summons, but when those summons are defeated, Boss Mirage's Toughness will be additionally reduced.
Boss Mirage's summon will mark 1 target. After Boss Mirage uses a single-target ability, it will deliver a Follow-Up Usage on the marked target.
All enemies receive 20% less DMG, but for every Weakness Type, DMG taken is increased by 5%.
extraDescs: Transfers the Weakness Type to the target. The Weakness Type returns to this unit after the target is defeated, and additionally reduces Toughness.
After using a single-target ability, the unit will re-select the target and use the ability again.

23401.name: Silver Knight of Virtuous Gallantry
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After Weakness is Broken, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by 100%.

Boss Mirage can switch its own Combat Stance in battle and summon different statues to fight. When characters defeat statues in the Soulfreed state, DMG dealt by the team in this battle will be increased.
When Boss Mirage uses Soulfreed in Phase II, it will target all statues.
For every unit on the enemy's side of the field aside from the Boss, all enemies receive 5% less DMG and deal 3% more DMG.
extraDescs:
The Silver Knight of Virtuous Gallantry will change their status throughout the fight:
Chivalric Wrath: Summons Speartip statues and takes less DMG from all sources. When 4 statues are on the field, the knight enters the Toughness Protection state.
Golden Harvest: Summons Shield statues and increases the knight's DMG dealt from all sources.
Medal of Elegance: Summons The Honored statues. When statues exist on the field, the knight cannot be selected as a target.

24400.name: Soulhook Sovereign
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After Weakness is Broken, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by 100%.

Boss Mirage summons 2 Elite Enemies to assist in battle. Boss Mirage will transmit its own Weakness Type to summons, but when those summons are defeated, Boss Mirage's Toughness will be additionally reduced.
For every unit on the enemy's side of the field aside from Boss Mirage, all enemies receive less DMG.
When the Boss Mirage uses Puppet Understudy in its second phase, it will apply Enhancement effects to all summons.
extraDescs: Transmits the Weakness Type to the target. After the target is defeated, additionally reduces Toughness. The Weakness Type will return once all targets that gained the Weakness Type are defeated.

24401.name: Starbane Doombringer
traitDescs: The Boss Mirage cannot be attacked directly. When all three parts of the Boss Mirage are in Feigned Death simultaneously, the Boss Mirage enters Weakness Break state and can be attacked. During this state, its actions are additionally delayed, and the DMG it receives increases by 100%.

The Antimatter Engine transfers its own weakness type to Disaster's Right Hand and Dawn's Left Hand. However, when Disaster's Right Hand or Dawn's Left Hand is defeated, the Antimatter Engine's Toughness is additionally reduced.

After using a single-target ability, enemy units gain increased SPD for 1 turn. After using an AoE ATK ability, their ATK increases for 1 turn. Using a Support ability recovers HP to the target of the ability.
Reduces DMG received by all enemies, but every Weakness Type they have increases DMG received.
extraDescs: Attacks to the parts will also reduce HP on the main body.
Transfers the Weakness Type to the target. The Weakness Type returns to this unit after the target is defeated, and additionally reduces Toughness.

25400.name: Daring Diceroller
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After its Weakness is Broken, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by 100%.
Boss Mirage's ability will grant all allies and enemies Points.
When allies have fewer Points than the summon's Points, the DMG taken by the summons greatly decreases.
The higher the summons' Points, the higher their Max HP.
extraDescs: When the enemy target's Points are higher than your team's, the enemies receive greatly reduced DMG and gain Toughness Protection. When allies attack enemies with fewer points than themselves, the higher the allies' Points, the higher the DMG taken by enemy targets. The maximum number of Points is 100.

25401.name: Opportunistic Provocateur
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After its Weakness is Broken, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by 100%.

When a new Lotus is summoned, Boss Mirage will enter the Toughness Protection state. Defeating any summon will dispel the Boss Mirage's Toughness Protection and deal additional Toughness Reduction to the Boss Mirage.
In Phase I, when Boss Mirage changes form, the summons will restore 25% HP.
In Phase II, the summons' Max HP increases by 20%.

26400.name: Cacophonic Conductor
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After its Weakness is Broken, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by 100%.
Summons take 50% less DMG. After Boss Mirage's Weakness is Broken, the DMG it receives increases by 100%.
Boss Mirage shares its own Weakness Type to summons, and at the same time, increases RES that does not correspond to Weakness Type by 40%.
Summons' Max Toughness increases by 10.
extraDescs: Shares the Weakness Type with the target. The Weakness Type will be applied to all enemy targets after the target is Weakness Broken, and additionally reduces Toughness.

27400.name: Blaznana Monkey Trick
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After its Weakness is Broken, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by 100%.
All enemy units take 50% less DMG and possesses Switch Tally while in Classroom Channel. After Boss Mirage's Weakness is Broken, the DMG it receives increases by 100%.
At the beginning of every turn, enemy units in Classroom Channel will lose a certain number in the Switch Tally.
Increases SPD for End-of-Semester Dinner.
extraDescs: Unit in the Classroom Channel state will gain 1 point in the Switch Tally when attacked. When the Switch Tally hits the max, it will switch the unit to the Off-Class Channel state and also reduce the Boss Mirage's Toughness and immediately obtain that unit's Off-Class Channel reward 1 time.

30400.name: Sky-Shrouding Stardevourer Swarm
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After its Weakness is Broken, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by 100%.
At the end of Boss Mirage's turn, Boss Mirage will gain a certain number of Insect Eggs. Boss Mirage can consume Insect Egg to enhance its Swarm summons and grant them 1 stack of Growth Hormone.
Every time Boss Mirage summons a certain number of Swarm summons, the next summon it summons will come automatically with 1 stack of Growth Hormone.
At the end of Boss Mirage's turn, the number of Insect Eggs gained through Nesting Incubation increases.
extraDescs: At the end of Boss Mirage's turn, Boss Mirage will gain a certain number of Insect Eggs. Boss Mirage can consume Insect Egg to enhance its Swarm summons and grant them 1 stack of Growth Hormone.
Every stack of Growth Hormones increases ATK by a certain amount, stacking up to 3 times. When 3 stacks are reached, Swarm summons will unlock Bonus Abilities.

32400.name: Fulminating Wolflord
traitDescs: Decreases DMG taken by Boss Mirage by 50%. After its Weakness is Broken, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by 100%.
When the Boss Mirage uses Barrenness of Earth Gouged, all other Wolftroopers will be eliminated.
After Boss Mirage enters Phase II, it gains extra action per turn during Going Solo.
After Boss Mirage enters Going Solo, reduces its DMG taken by an additional 15%.

34400.name: Flame Reaver of Doomsday Led Astray
traitDescs: Decreases DMG taken by Boss Mirage by 50%. After its Weakness is Broken, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by 100%.
After losing the first layer of Toughness or after taking a certain number of actions, Boss Mirage enters the Shackle Shatter state, changes their attack patterns.
Defeating Complete Vessel no longer reduces Boss Mirage's Toughness.
Max HP of all Long-Shattered Vessels and Complete Vessels increases.
extraDescs: Alternates between using Dying Sobs and But Suffering is Essential. Dying Sobs summons Long-Shattered Vessel and enters Charging state, and But Suffering is Essential deals Powerful Attacks. Calamity Power stacks increases the Hits Per Action of Powerful Attacks. After destroying Long-Shattered Vessel, Toughness and Calamity Power stacks can be reduced. In the second phase, Silent Sorrow and Cry Not for the Discarded will be used, and Calamity Power stacks increases.

35400.name: Sanerot Hearteater
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After its Weakness is Broken, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by 100%.
Parts take 50% less DMG. After Boss Mirage's Weakness is Broken, the DMG they receive increases by 100%.
Boss Mirage's Toughness increases by 40.
The duration of Malediction state increases by 1 turn(s).

36400.name: Guide of Withering and Decay
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After its Weakness is Broken, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by 100%.

In this combat, ally units' HP will not drop below 1, and any DMG taken exceeding a certain amount of their current HP will be converted into HP Overload. Ally units in the HP Overload state will have their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency greatly reduced.
The Long Arms of Sorrow's Max Toughness increases.
Reduces DMG received by all enemies, but every Weakness Type they have increases DMG received.

40400.name: The Ravaged Unconquerable
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After its Weakness is Broken, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by 100%.

Boss Mirage and its summons have War Armor, reducing DMG taken by them. In phase two, War Armor will be enhanced to Centirefined War Armor, greatly increasing the maximum stack limit, and Boss Mirage will gain additional Toughness Protection.
In Phase 2, the max stack of Boss Mirage's Centirefined War Armor will increase.
For every unit on the enemy's side of the field aside from Boss Mirage, all enemies receive less DMG and deal more DMG.
extraDescs: Decreases DMG taken. Loses stacks of War Armor based on the attacker's Glory stacks when attacked. When at 0 stacks, War Armor will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit, reducing their Toughness, delaying their action, and restoring Skill Point(s) to targets. After War Armor is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. War Armor will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

Decreases DMG taken. After being attacked, reduces stacks of Centirefined War Armor based on the attacker's Glory stacks. When reduced to 0 stacks, Centirefined War Armor is destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit, reducing a large amount of Toughness, delaying their action, restoring Skill Points to targets, and granting the attacker certain stacks of Glory. After Centirefined War Armor is destroyed, this unit will additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. If Centirefined War Armor is at 0 stacks at the end of this unit's turn, it will be restored to maximum stacks.

42400.name: Super Idol: Center of Attention
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After Weakness is Broken, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by 100%.

The Boss Mirage will initiate a Live Showdown during combat, selecting one ally character to battle on the sub-field while the remaining characters stay on the prime-field to provide Support. Once the Live Showdown begins, enemy targets on the prime-field take reduced DMG and become immune to Crowd Control debuffs, and the Boss Mirage enters the Toughness Lock state. When the Boss Mirage's turn starts, both Ally Popularity and Enemy Popularity reset to their initial states.
Increases the max Ally Popularity and Enemy Popularity.
For each Ally Popularity or Enemy Popularity that hasn't hit the Limit, DMG taken by all enemies is reduced.
extraDescs: All ally targets will engage in combat in prime-field and sub-field respectively. Aside the Aha Instant, targets from different battlefields cannot attack targets on the other battlefield. During the Aha Instant, Elation Skills can only be used to attack enemy targets that are on the sub-field. Live Showdown will be dispelled when any of these conditions are met: Live Showdown countdown ends, an sub-field ally character is knocked down, all sub-field enemy targets are defeated, or there are no sub-field ally characters remaining who can battle.

43400.name: Arbiter of the Lost Abyss
traitDescs: Boss Mirage takes 50% less DMG. After Weakness is Broken, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by 100%.

At the start of combat and during phase transitions, the Boss Mirage splits into 5 Ichor Memosprites and applies Monoform Merger to these summons. When all Ichor Memosprites with Monoform Merger enter the Feigned Death state, they merge back into the Boss Mirage.
Increases the Max HP of the Ichor Memosprites summoned after the Boss Mirage's split, and the Ichor Memosprites summoned after the split in the second phase have Shared HP.
For every unit on the enemy's side of the field that is not in the Feigned Death state aside from Boss Mirage, all enemies receive less DMG and deal more DMG.
extraDescs: When receiving fatal damage, enters the Feigned Death state. When all Ichor Memosprites possessing Monoform Merger enter the Feigned Death state, they merge back into the Arbiter of the Lost Abyss.
Cannot be selected, cannot take action.
